programme.title: Versus: The Life & Films of Ken Loach

The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Arman mysteriously disappears, Thony and Nadia team up to look for him. Fiona tries to manage the aftermath of her deportation and reconnects with an old flame.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony turns to Ramona to get Fiona back to the United States but finds herself indebted; a secret Fiona has kept hidden for decades comes to light, creating friction between herself and family members.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Thony is tasked with cleaning cars for Ramona, she comes across a distressed woman in need of medical attention; Fiona attempts to return to the States.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony focuses on getting Fiona back home with the help of Jorge; Nadia continues to investigate Arman's disappearance and finds herself face-to-face with Ramona.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony focuses on getting Fiona back home with the help of Jorge; Nadia continues to investigate Arman's disappearance and finds herself face-to-face with Ramona.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When Thony and Fiona are faced with a terrifying situation, they set out to fix it before it's too late; Jorge throws a wrench in Ramona's plan to find Arman, and Ramona starts to question his allegiance.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony gets a new lead on Arman's whereabouts; Ramona tries to cut a deal with Nadia; Luca attends his first day of school.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony gets a new lead on Arman's whereabouts; Ramona tries to cut a deal with Nadia; Luca attends his first day of school.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Ramona grows increasingly apprehensive of Thony's involvement in Arman's life and suspects Thony and Nadia of jeopardising her and Jorge's plans; Jeremy volunteers to install security equipment at Fiona's house.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Ramona grows increasingly apprehensive of Thony's involvement in Arman's life and suspects Thony and Nadia of jeopardising her and Jorge's plans; Jeremy volunteers to install security equipment at Fiona's house.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Thony starts to spiral, Fiona grows tired of her antics and goes to Russo for help; Ramona and Jorge focus on cleaning up Arman's mess, ensuring nothing can be traced back to them.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Thony starts to spiral, Fiona grows tired of her antics and goes to Russo for help; Ramona and Jorge focus on cleaning up Arman's mess, ensuring nothing can be traced back to them.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Ramona considers an offer from Thony that causes a shift in their dynamic. Jorge teams up with Nadia as a way to use her connections. Russo's team gets closer to breaking their case open.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Ramona considers an offer from Thony that causes a shift in their dynamic. Jorge teams up with Nadia as a way to use her connections. Russo's team gets closer to breaking their case open.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Ramona tries to recruit Thony into her business; the FBI organizes a plan to take down Ramona.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Russo receives a terrifying warning from Sin Cara; Jorge gets news that could alter his alliances.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: With the FBI on Ramona's case, it's clear she's not as powerful as she once was, but with a reputation like hers, she still has cards left to play.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony reckons with what it means to be a good employee or a good person; Fiona deals with a difficult client that helps Chris connect with an old friend.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Thony reckons with what it means to be a good employee or a good person; Fiona deals with a difficult client that helps Chris connect with an old friend.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: With threats from all sides closing in, Thony takes a drastic step to secure her freedom that could change everything.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When the system fails a whip-smart Cambodian doctor who comes to the US for medical treatment to save her ailing son, she uses her cunning to forge a path in the criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: When the system fails a whip-smart Cambodian doctor who comes to the US for medical treatment to save her ailing son, she uses her cunning to forge a path in the criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: With Ramona's increasing presence, the Sin Cara family faces off for dominance; when Luca's honesty threatens the family's secrets, Thony must make a tough decision.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: With Ramona's increasing presence, the Sin Cara family faces off for dominance; when Luca's honesty threatens the family's secrets, Thony must make a tough decision.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: Settling into their new arrangement, Thony tries calling the shots with Ramona; Fiona has a heart-to-heart with Chris and Jaz as the family's dynamic makes big changes.

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.sub-title: I Heard It Through The Grapevine

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: As Thony fights to save a life, she finds herself caught between two men and the ghosts of their pasts; Jorge's relentless pursuit of vengeance blinds him to the truth.

programme.desc: Thony must find a way to protect her freedom and family as she finds herself surrounded by chaos; when Jorge catches wind of Ramona's plans, he's willing to do anything to stop her.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Jenny Eclair enjoys potatoes falling on her head while Ivo Graham fumes. As emotions run high, everyone goes all out to impress the ever demanding Taskmaster.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Jenny Eclair enjoys potatoes falling on her head while Ivo Graham fumes. As emotions run high, everyone goes all out to impress the ever demanding Taskmaster.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We start this show at a breakneck pace as we try to keep up with the Speeders, before trying to answer that age-old question, are Two Wheels Better Than Four?

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We expose you to some of the most piggish behaviour, carried out by those hideous road hogs, and then settle in for another thrilling round of America's favourite motor sport in Stock Car Collisions.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We expose you to some of the most piggish behaviour, carried out by those hideous road hogs, and then settle in for another thrilling round of America's favourite motor sport in Stock Car Collisions.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Hosted by Aisha Tyler, this episode features Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performer Gary Anthony Williams and star guest Wilson Bethel from the CW's Hart of Dixie.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Hosted by Aisha Tyler, this episode features Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performer Gary Anthony Williams and star guest Wilson Bethel from the CW's Hart of Dixie.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the connection between Nolan's Cross and The Knights Templar deepens the team digs up treasure on Lot Five.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: As the connection between Nolan's Cross and The Knights Templar deepens the team digs up treasure on Lot Five.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: After finding themselves trapped in a cave, Velma and Daphne are forced to confront their complicated relationship. Fred proves he really does love women for their brains.

programme.title: Velma
programme.desc: After finding themselves trapped in a cave, Velma and Daphne are forced to confront their complicated relationship. Fred proves he really does love women for their brains.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We marvel at some truly awful driving that could only of been carried out by those possessing some Staggering Stupidity, before switching focus from wheels to legs.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We get away from it all and see if the roads are any less perilous when you head Out In The Sticks, spoiler alert, they aren't, and then turn those roads into a dance floor for Strictly Car Crashing.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We get away from it all and see if the roads are any less perilous when you head Out In The Sticks, spoiler alert, they aren't, and then turn those roads into a dance floor for Strictly Car Crashing.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Tara Lipinksi and Keegan-Michael Key feature as special guests.

programme.desc: Rob, Steelo, and Nina Agdal roll the food dice and lose, and enjoy the view from the cheap seats.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Back To The Future III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter. It's the final chapter in the time-travelling comedy series.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sasha convert front steps for wedding season; Nick and Nicole finish their dining room for their son's first birthday.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Wollaton Hall, highlights include a fire extinguisher cocktail shaker that stuns the silver expert Kate Flitcroft.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles and the team hunt for bargains at Exeter's Westpoint Arena. Helping the red and blue teams spend 300 pounds on three items are Nick Hall and Richard Madley.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A nine-year-old boy is in A&E with hid dad after suffering from a dangerously high heart rate. Meanwhile, a 32-year-old man has fallen 30 feet from scaffolding.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: From Wollaton Hall, highlights include a fire extinguisher cocktail shaker that stuns the silver expert Kate Flitcroft.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: If You Go Down To The Woods Today...
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Love fills the hotel as staff celebrate romance and friendship, from anniversaries and roses to heartfelt moments shared among the Four Seasons family.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman is in Devon on a house-hunting mission with a professional singer who has a 670,000-pounds budget to buy a country home that hits the right note.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: It's week two, and there are three challenges inspired by sport: a half zip fleece, an outfit from cricket kit and a national strip fit for the world stage.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Charles and Dale have lived in their Pymble home 32 years and raised four kids here. Their youngest, Heath, is still at home but it's time for them to sell and downsize. Can the team help them start the next chapter?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a rock-climbing couple find a North Yorkshire home near the hills and visits the Great Yorkshire Show.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Chinese ceramics expert Lars Tharp sees a rare double Ming dynasty vase bought in a charity shop, and Raj Bisram discovers some valuable Beatles memorabilia.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles and the team hunt for bargains at Exeter's Westpoint Arena. Helping the red and blue teams spend 300 pounds on three items are Nick Hall and Richard Madley.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Melissa visits Lambley Gardens, 40 acres of complex garden design including stunning flower fields, fruit and an extensive veggie garden, all set around a 19th-century farmhouse.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sasha convert front steps for wedding season; Nick and Nicole finish their dining room for their son's first birthday.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil is with married couple Mike and David who are returning from Central America and want their first home. Meanwhile, Kirstie is with science teachers Kat and Pat, who desperately want a place of their own.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Jade and James bought a three-bedroom, two-bath home two years ago for $530,000, and need to sell up to gain more space and independence now their family is growing. Can Andrew, Shyanna and Charlie help?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey and Joel say they bought the worst house in the best street in Adelaide. While local Pastor Tracey loves the character of their 90-year-old home, husband Joel is less of a fan and feels it's not big enough for their family of five. Can Andrew shine a light on better homes, or will Neale's renovation solve their dilemmas?

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a retired teacher find a seaside home on the Jurassic Coast and enjoys a yoga session after a seagull mishap.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Tracey & Joel bought Adelaide's worst house. Tracey loves their 90-year-old home, but Joel finds it too small. Will Andrew find a better home, or will Neale's renovation solve it?

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: Pulled from the sea, Jason Bourne discovers he has the skills of a very dangerous man and no memory of his past.

programme.title: Being John Malkovich
programme.desc: A depressed Craig Schwartz sells tickets to people so they can enter a portal into actor John Malkovich's mind.

programme.title: Hailey Dean: A Marriage Made for Murder
programme.desc: Hailey's professional code of ethics prevents her from going to the police about a client's confession, so she must find another way to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: An up-and-coming young lawyer sues his former employer for wrongful termination after he suspects his dismissal from his prestigious job may have been due to his contracting AIDS.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: As a police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop, the biggest diamond heist ever committed is in motion.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: A crackpot New York cabbie lands in trouble after his conspiracy magazine attracts the interest of shady government heavies and leads to five unexplained murders.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: A financial TV host and his producer are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Native New Yorker Rachel accompanies her long-time boyfriend Nick to his friend's wedding in Singapore. But she's unprepared to learn a few key details about his life.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: When three friends wake up in a trashed Las Vegas hotel room after a bachelor party, they realise the groom is missing and must piece together the night's events - one hazy clue at a time.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: A poignant and often hilarious story about Shelby, a headstrong young girl about to get married, with six amazing women providing strength, friendship and love in a small southern town.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias
programme.desc: A poignant and often hilarious story about Shelby, a headstrong young girl about to get married, with six amazing women providing strength, friendship and love in a small southern town.

programme.title: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: Rachel is a generous and loyal pal to her engaged best friend Darcy. But after celebrating her 30th birthday, perpetual good girl Rachel unexpectedly ends up in the arms of Darcy's fiance.

programme.title: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: Rachel is a generous and loyal pal to her engaged best friend Darcy. But after celebrating her 30th birthday, perpetual good girl Rachel unexpectedly ends up in the arms of Darcy's fiance.

programme.title: The Mirror Has Two Faces
programme.desc: Two best friends agree to an unconventional marriage built on intellectual passion instead of sexual heat. But when then fall in love, they realise they are courting chaos.

programme.title: The Dressmaker
programme.desc: With her glamorous style and sewing machine in tow, a woman returns to her remote home town to set things right, but finds her talent by transforming the women she left behind.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: When a woman seduces Dom into the world of crime, the crew face trials that will test them like never before.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime.

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: The ruler of wicked Gomorrah, who relies on a sorcerer's visions, lays waste to the tribes of the desert. The survivors hire an assassin to kill the sorcerer who turns out to be a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Doom
programme.desc: A frantic call for help from a remote research station on Mars sends a team of mercenary Marines into action.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: A disgraced cop infiltrates the Miami street racing scene with an ex-con to redeem himself by bringing down a drug lord.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating a highly skilled international rogue organisation that is committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: Wedding Wars
programme.desc: In the midst of organising his brother Ben's wedding, Shel, a gay party planner, decides to go on strike for equal rights when he learns that Ben is behind a political speech against gay marriage.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: After a little white lie about losing her virginity gets out, a clean-cut high school girl decides to use the rumour mill to advance her social and financial standing.

programme.title: The American President
programme.desc: When the widowed US president courts a Washington lobbyist, wild rumours decimate his approval ratings. An intelligent political-romantic comedy.

programme.title: The American President
programme.desc: When the widowed US president courts a Washington lobbyist, wild rumours decimate his approval ratings. An intelligent political-romantic comedy.

programme.title: And So It Goes
programme.desc: When an estranged son leaves his daughter with her conceited grandfather, who never knew she existed, he reluctantly turns to his widowed neighbour for help.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's bestselling novel set in an exotic world tells the story of a servant who blossoms against all odds to become the most enchanting geisha of her day.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's bestselling novel set in an exotic world tells the story of a servant who blossoms against all odds to become the most enchanting geisha of her day.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When a food stylist finds out the owner of her favorite bakery is retiring and sponsoring a baking contest to see who will be her successor, she enters but then is forced to join forces with a rival chef.

programme.title: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When a food stylist finds out the owner of her favorite bakery is retiring and sponsoring a baking contest to see who will be her successor, she enters but then is forced to join forces with a rival chef.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs, and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs, and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: After a radioactive spider bite, a nerdy teen develops keen senses and amazing strength.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is coping with some major life changes. His owner is now married and has a toddler, Liam. Max is so worried about protecting the boy that he develops a nervous tic. On a family trip to a farm, Max and mutt Duke encounter canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a terrifying turkey, all of which only elevates Max's anxiety. Luckily, Max gets some guidance from veteran farm dog Rooster, who pushes Max to ditch his neuroses, find his inner alpha and give Liam a little more freedom.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets 2
programme.desc: Terrier Max is coping with some major life changes. His owner is now married and has a toddler, Liam. Max is so worried about protecting the boy that he develops a nervous tic. On a family trip to a farm, Max and mutt Duke encounter canine-intolerant cows, hostile foxes and a terrifying turkey, all of which only elevates Max's anxiety. Luckily, Max gets some guidance from veteran farm dog Rooster, who pushes Max to ditch his neuroses, find his inner alpha and give Liam a little more freedom.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit, the mischievous and adventurous hero who has captivated generations of readers, now takes on the starring role of his own cute, contemporary comedy with attitude. In the film, Peter's feud with Mr. McGregor escalates to greater heights than ever before as they rival for the affections of the warm-hearted animal lover who lives next door.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: After he is fired from the Anti-Villain League for failing to take down the latest bad guy to threaten humanity, Gru finds himself in the middle of a major identity crisis. When a mysterious stranger shows up to inform Gru that he has a long-lost twin brother who desperately wishes to follow in his twin's despicable footsteps, one former supervillain will rediscover just how good it feels to be bad.

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into mouse burgers!

programme.title: An American Tail: Fievel Goes West
programme.desc: Lured out west by the crafty Cat R. Waul, Fievel joins forces with famed lawdog Wylie Blurp to thwart a sinister plot to transform unsuspecting settlers into mouse burgers!

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: A true story of a sled dog who braved the Alaskan wilderness to carry life-saving medicine to a remote village in 1925. A remarkable tale of a hero who inspired a nation.

programme.title: Balto
programme.desc: Part husky/part wolf, Balto doesn't know where he belongs. He's an outcast in Alaska, except to his true friends - Boris, the Russian snow goose; polar bear cubs Muk and Luk; and the beautiful husky, Jenna. Even though he's different, all of Balto's friends recognise what he still can't see himself: his noble spirit. One day, a serious diphtheria epidemic spreads fast among the children of Nome. When a fierce blizzard closes off all routes of transport, there's no way to obtain lifesaving medicine unless a team of sled dogs can race six-hundred miles through the blinding Arctic storm and bring back anti-toxin. But when the dogs get lost in the frozen wilderness, only Balto can rescue the team and save the children.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: Sylvanian Families
programme.desc: In Sylvanian village, everyone awaits the Festival of the Stars, but rabbit girl Freya worries as she must find the Tree of the Year for the main event.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Sing 2
programme.desc: Buster Moon and his friends must persuade reclusive rock star Clay Calloway to join them for the opening of a new show.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: As kids in the 1980s, Sam Brenner, Will Cooper, Ludlow Lamonsoff, and Eddie 'The Fire Blaster' Plant saved the world thousands of times - at 25 cents a game in the video arcades. Now, they're going to have to do it for real. When intergalactic aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as the models for their assaults, and now, US President Cooper must call on his old-school arcade friends to save the world from being destroyed by PAC-MAN, Donkey Kong, Galaga, Centipede, and Space Invaders. Joining them is Lt Col Violet Van Patten, a specialist supplying the arcaders with unique weapons to fight the aliens.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: As kids in the 1980s, Sam Brenner, Will Cooper, Ludlow Lamonsoff, and Eddie 'The Fire Blaster' Plant saved the world thousands of times - at 25 cents a game in the video arcades. Now, they're going to have to do it for real. When intergalactic aliens discover video feeds of classic arcade games and misinterpret them as a declaration of war, they attack the Earth, using the video games as the models for their assaults, and now, US President Cooper must call on his old-school arcade friends to save the world from being destroyed by PAC-MAN, Donkey Kong, Galaga, Centipede, and Space Invaders. Joining them is Lt Col Violet Van Patten, a specialist supplying the arcaders with unique weapons to fight the aliens.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru. With the help of Jeff, his faithful dog, an intrepid teacher, a mute parrot and a hustler, they will try to save the mythical Lost City of the Incas from an evil band of treasure hunters.

programme.title: Tad The Lost Explorer
programme.desc: Due to a fortuitous mix-up, Tad, a dreamy construction worker, is mistaken for a famous archaeologist and sent on an expedition to Peru.

programme.title: Touch
programme.desc: A romantic and thrilling story that spans several decades and continents, as one man goes on a journey to find his first love who disappeared 50 years ago.

programme.title: Funny Birds
programme.desc: College student Charlie returns to her family farm to help her mother. Their lives differ, and when Charlie's French grandmother arrives, old wounds resurface.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic lures a struggling actress into a blackmail scheme that has deadly consequences.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic lures a struggling actress into a blackmail scheme that has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: The Fall Guy
programme.desc: A down-and-out stuntman must find the missing star of his ex-girlfriend's blockbuster film.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Greg is poised to propose to his girlfriend during a visit to her parents' home. But he needs to ask her father. However, Pam's ex-CIA father takes an immediate dislike to her less-than-truthful beau.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: A man finds out that his best friend and business partner's wife may be cheating, plunging him into the moral dilemma of deciding whether to tell his friend. Comic mayhem ensues.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: Three older guys get to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams becoming heroes to the bullied, clumsy and athletically-challenged everywhere.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Can a clueless super spy save the day without denting the nation's pride, or his super-cool Aston Martin spy car?

programme.title: Hollywood Homicide
programme.desc: With both Internal Affairs and their main suspect on their tails, veteran police detective Joe and his rookie partner KC have to infiltrate the dangerous world of the hip-hop recording industry.

programme.title: Bad Neighbours 2
programme.desc: Mac and Kelly decide to sell and move to the suburbs. But when a sorority moves in and threatens the sale, they must team up with their former enemy Teddy, to bring the girls down.
